calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-15-2021 Off Calendar

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-13-2021 Continued To Jul-27-21 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Motion To Set Case For Default Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Apr-29-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for further Default Prove-Up Hearing as to defendant First Group America.
Dept. 514. Judge: Murlene J. Randle. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty. Reporter: Giselle Casey, CSR #8098. Telephone: 415-551-3680. Email: gcasey@sftc.org.

Oyewole Akinyemi, Esq. appeared with plaintiff Debrah Daniels, who was placed under oath and testified.
Both Ms. Daniels and Mr. Akinyemi appeared via ZOOM for this morning's hearing.
No appearance by defendant First Group America.

Plaintiff's Complaint for Personal Injury for Negligence, Assault and Battery was filed on February 13, 2020, and personally served on defendant First Group America on May 14, 2020.
Dismissal without prejudice as to defendant Smart Transportation Division filed with the Clerk's Office on April 15, 2020.
Dismissal without prejudice as to defendant Alfonso Fields filed with the Clerk's Office on November 10, 2020.
Statement of Damages filed December 18, 2020. (Served on defendant First Group America on September 18, 2020)
Default as to defendant First Group America was entered on December 18, 2020.
DOE defendants were dismissed today, April 29, 2021.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Debrah Daniels, and against the defaulted defendant First Group America, as follows:

General Damages - $40,000.00.
Special Damages - $18,050.00.
Costs - $75.00.

Total - $58,125.00.

Counsel for plaintiff to prepare the proposed Judgment and submit same to the Court for review and signature.
